content.full_text:
October 12, 2000

Judith Valles, Mayor
City of San Bernardino
300 North D Street
San Bernardino, CA 92418-0001

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-00-177

Dear Mayor Valles:

Pursuant to our conversation of October 10, 2000, this letter will confirm that your August 3, 2000 correspondence for advice has been withdrawn. After further discussion of the issues raised by your request, we have determined that the Attorney General’s office has jurisdiction over the questions posed by you. Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: Deborah Allison
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
